purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Bai Yi multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Do not create a new Bai Yi personal crest. Use the current Suming / Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun system only as small institutional marks on robe, collar, white register, wax seal, or back seal.
must_have: Bai Yi must read as a highly human-like upper-intelligence insectoid official: cold handsome near-human face, highly readable large black compound eyes, over-2-meter height, very slender vertical body, and elongated hands
three states must preserve one continuous identity

high cylindrical Qingming official hat, dustless white official robe, near-human bone-white insect-wax face, large almond-shaped black compound eyes in normal eye positions, translucent wing-membrane shoulder cape, white register, wax needle, and cold-white incense thread must be present
a single thin money-tail / rat-tail pigtail must hang from the back of the bald head or under the rear edge of the official hat, visible in side or back view
compound eyes must show dense micro-lens dots, honeycomb-like grain, wet black lacquer highlights, and no sclera, iris, or ordinary pupil
no ugly insect head, no skull mask, no beak, no mandibles, no small human eyes, no full human hair, no loose hair, no modern ponytail
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: missing rear pigtail, full human hair, loose hair, bangs, side hair, modern ponytail, ugly insect head, skull mask, white monster face plate, beak, mandibles, fanged mouth, bug skull, ordinary human pupils, sclera, iris, small normal human eye shape, short body, broad muscular body, squat proportions, handsome masked man, human official wearing mask, black armored warlord, knight armor, generic fantasy villain, lower-tier insect monster body, giant beetle, mantis soldier, spider body, soft angel wings, feather wings, halo, priest costume, redesigned Qingming badge, new Bai Yi personal crest, generic black sun logo, insect body emblem, pasted sticker emblem, modern hospital, blue-white sci-fi lab, blood-soaked lab, dirty dungeon, gore, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk

input_images.role: locked Suming / Qingming emblem reference; preserve white-wing-over-black-sun institutional shape without redesign
locked Qingming symbol extension board for seals, register marks, collar pins, robe marks, and wax usage
insect-wax needle, incense, wax seal, and tool reference

prompts.image_prompt:
Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Bai Yi / 白翳 from the series Severed Homeland. This is a corrected prompt pass for compound-eye readability plus the mandatory insect-caste rear pigtail. Bai Yi's face must stay beautiful and near-human, but the compound eyes must be unmistakable. He is an upper-intelligence insectoid whose face has become extremely close to human, with a cold handsome high-official face, long refined proportions, narrow jaw, high bridge, thin lips, clean bone-white skin or very thin insect-wax glaze. His eyes are the main insect trait: large almond-shaped black obsidian compound-eye surfaces set into normal human eye positions, slightly larger and longer than human eyes, with no sclera, no iris, and no normal pupil. The eye surfaces must show dense micro-lens dots, honeycomb-like grain, wet black lacquer highlights, and granular reflection, while still sitting inside a refined human facial structure. The head is bald under the high official hat, but a single thin money-tail / rat-tail pigtail must hang from the back of the bald head or from under the rear edge of the hat; show it clearly in side or back view as a low, narrow queue, not loose hair and not a modern ponytail. The other obvious insect traits are height above 2 meters, very slender vertical body, elongated hands, restrained joint language, and translucent wing-membrane shoulder cape. Do not make him an insect skull, chitin mask, beak, mandible face, monster head, or handsome man wearing a mask.

Use the current Suming / Qingming visual language: insect-wax white, bone white, pearl grey, black sun, cold gold, translucent insect wing membrane, dark compound-eye black, and tiny dry-blood red only at needle-risk details. Do not redesign the existing Qingming emblem and do not create a new personal crest; any white-wing-over-black-sun mark must be small institutional usage on a collar, chest seal, white-register corner, wax seal, or back mark, never a pasted badge card.

Show the same over-2-meter, extremely slender, near-human upper-intelligence insectoid official in three full-body standing states: 1) Qingming inspector official robe: tall vertical stillness, high cylindrical Qingming official hat, dustless insect-wax white long robe, bone-white hard collar, cold handsome near-human face, large black compound eyes readable even at small size, thin rear pigtail visible from side or back, translucent wing-membrane shoulder cape, small locked institutional mark, Qingming white register, insect-wax needle; 2) pseudo-human ruler formal robe: most human-official in silhouette, ceremonial long white robe, straight front placket, hanging white straps or bead chains, cold-gold pins and wax fasteners, bald head under hat with one rear pigtail, large compound eyes still visible; 3) pursuit official robe: narrower action state with folded membrane cape and tightened robe hem, cold-white Qingming incense thread touching a cloth edge, needle-handling visible, still official white and not black armor.

Include unlabeled detail panels for: cold handsome near-human face with large almond-shaped black compound eyes and visible micro-lens texture, high official hat shell with vertical seams and cold-gold pins, back/side head detail showing the single thin money-tail / rat-tail pigtail under the rear hat edge, bone-white collar and small institutional mark, translucent wing-membrane shoulder cape with vein texture, long clean elongated hand holding insect-wax needle, Qingming white register corner and wax seal with no readable text, cold-white incense thread clinging to fabric, subtle dark neck membrane and green-black chitin undertone mostly hidden by robe. Add a small unlabeled material swatch strip showing insect-wax white, bone white, pearl grey, black sun black, cold gold, translucent membrane, green-black chitin, and tiny dry-blood red. Keep the image elegant, clean, oppressive, ritual, bureaucratic, cinematic, and tactile. No labels, no captions, no Chinese characters, no Latin letters, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: missing rear pigtail, full human hair, loose hair, bangs, side hair, modern ponytail, ugly insect head, skull mask, white monster face plate, beak, mandibles, fanged mouth, bug skull, deformed face, old wrinkled monster, ordinary human pupils, sclera, iris, small normal human eye shape, human eyeballs, short body, broad muscular body, squat proportions, handsome masked man, ordinary human official wearing mask, black armored warlord, knight armor, warrior armor, lower-tier insect monster body, giant beetle, mantis soldier, spider body, bulky monster anatomy, soft angel wings, feather wings, halo, priest costume, religious saint light, redesigned Qingming badge, new Bai Yi crest, generic black sun logo, insect body emblem, pasted square emblem card, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, modern hospital, blue-white sci-fi lab, blood-soaked laboratory, dirty dungeon, gore, high magic spell circle, combat magic smoke, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi
